subject: psa-1my
message: Enrich DevDataSeeder phone calls with full transcription/analysis for demo

bead.title: Enrich DevDataSeeder phone calls with full transcription/analysis for demo
bead.description: For the MSP demo, seeded calls need to show the transcription feature fully. Only the voicemail had a transcript (no sentiment/charge/coaching/next-steps); the two answered calls had no recording_url so the transcription card never rendered. Add cleaned_transcript, next_steps, sentiment_score, charge_classification, coaching_notes; set recording_url on answered calls; add one un-ticketed transcribed voicemail so 'Create Ticket from Call' is demoable.

bead.close_reason: Enriched 3 seeded calls with cleaned_transcript/next_steps/sentiment/charge/coaching + recording_url; added 1 un-ticketed transcribed voicemail for Create-Ticket-from-Call demo. Verified rendering on /calls/2 and /calls/5 (HTTP 200, full transcription card).

subject: psa-48b
message: Expose ticket phone calls + transcripts to Assistant/MCP tool surface

bead.title: Expose ticket phone calls + transcripts to Assistant/MCP tool surface
bead.description: The Assistant/MCP tool surface (shared by inline ticket assistant, Teams bot, and Claude Desktop MCP) has no access to a ticket's linked phone calls or their transcripts/summaries. Add a compact calls[] summary to get_ticket_detail and a dedicated get_ticket_calls tool returning full transcripts. Deploy to prod (Claude Desktop hits prod).

bead.close_reason: Implemented get_ticket_calls + calls[] in get_ticket_detail; verified via executor + MCP boundary (tools/list/tools/call); merged (PR #9) and deployed to prod (psa.soundit.co now at d08673e, feature live).

subject: psa-9b1
message: Fix double-encoded JSON array fields in DevDataSeeder (500 on triaged tickets)

bead.title: Fix double-encoded JSON array fields in DevDataSeeder (500 on triaged tickets)
bead.description: DevDataSeeder wrapped array-cast fields in json_encode() (TriageRun stages_completed/stage_results/ai_tokens_used, Email to_recipients), causing double-encoding. On read the cast returns a string, so _triage_card.blade.php implode() threw and EVERY triaged ticket detail page 500'd. Fixed seeder to pass arrays directly, guarded the view's implode, and corrected existing dev DB rows in place. Dev-only (DevDataSeeder not run on prod; prod triage data is pipeline-generated arrays).

subject: psa-9b1

bead.description: DevDataSeeder wrapped array-cast fields in json_encode() (TriageRun stages_completed/stage_results/ai_tokens_used, Email to_recipients), causing double-encoding. On read the cast returns a string, so _triage_card.blade.php implode() threw and EVERY triaged ticket detail page 500'd. Fixed seeder to pass arrays directly, guarded the view's implode, and corrected existing dev DB rows in place. Dev-only (DevDataSeeder not run on prod; prod triage data is pipeline-generated arrays).
bead.close_reason: Root cause: DevDataSeeder double-encoded array-cast fields (json_encode on TriageRun/Email array casts) -> implode() 500 on every triaged ticket. Fixed seeder + guarded view + corrected existing dev DB rows. Verified end-to-end: all ticket pages 1-17 return 200, triage cards render classification+reasoning. PR #10 raised (dev-only; prod unaffected).

subject: psa-rxq
message: Clean up: rebase PR #8 + clear repo-wide Pint debt (243 files)

bead.title: Clean up: rebase PR #8 + clear repo-wide Pint debt (243 files)
bead.description: Post-demo cleanup. (1) Rebase PR #8 (call enrichment) onto current main as a clean single commit. (2) Apply Pint across the whole codebase (243 files) to clear standing style debt so the changed-file gate stops biting. (3) Tidy dev box working tree + stray files.
